items.title: ONN Remark Codes
items.content:
Under Self Insured
  • N864 - This claim is subject to the No Surprises Act provisions that apply to emergency services.

items.title: Good Evening Everyone! Happy Thursday! 🎉Please carefully read and acknowledge all updates below!
items.content:
• For payor related questions please tag Brooke Clayton
  • For breakdowns please tag Christy Hildreth
  • For inpatient please tag Sherrilyn Andy

Payers that need to be escalated immediately:

All Health First/Health First Health Plans

BCBS Kansas-Do not update this payor without escalating.

All Kaiser

All Allied

Ameriben 

Regence BlueCross BlueShield claims for the client Utah Valley Emergency Physicians 

 

BE ADVISED!

Effective Immediately: Every BCBS Kansas, Kansas Building Trades and BCBS Kansas City claim need to be approved by POC. No exceptions!

 

 

EFFECTIVE IMMEDIATELY: Escalate any split claims! We need to review EOBs that have two different claim numbers and two separate EOBs but Arbit has all the CPT codes. DO NOT combine claim numbers in Arbit, as we have received new directive.

items.title: Postal FEP Pacific
items.content:
For FEP Pacific Customer update to Blue Shield FEP if it has a initial 25 claim number, R policy, and California state. 


Reference: Here.

items.title: TRS / HEALTHSELECT
items.content: Prefix is present as OOS may we process. Since this is a TEXAS claim in the state of Oklahoma it is an OOS policy for NSA.

items.title: TPA - SAVERS
items.content: ALL SAVERS all policies are self-funded

items.title: SANA BENEFITS - TPA
items.content: SANA BENEFITS - All Policies are Self Funded. Verified through provider chat support - Reference number: 911438/Luis.

items.title: Ambetter and BAYLOR SCOTT claims
items.content: EOB Remark Codes surpasses the funding type; it is very important to go by how the EOB was processed (EXCEPT FOR AMBETTER AND BAYLOR & SCOTT)

items.title: FEP or FDERAL FEP
items.content:
Do always make queries with the POC even if we have a instruction with the payor mapping team on how to identify the FEP claim.
